name: supabase
description: Supabase MCP integration with setup, usage, and CLI skills for auth, schema exploration, migrations, and query workflows.

interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Supabase through the official MCP endpoint with OAuth, then use built-in setup, usage, and CLI skills for schema inspection, auth troubleshooting, RLS guidance, migrations, local dev commands, and query patterns.
defaultPrompt: Run /supabase:setup and validate my Supabase MCP connection
Use /supabase:cli to run safe Supabase CLI workflows for local dev and migrations
Inspect my Supabase schema and suggest query improvements
Help troubleshoot Supabase auth, RLS policy, or database issues
